# License

This project is a fork of [https://github.com/opendatacube/cube-in-a-box](https://github.com/opendatacube/cube-in-a-box), and consequently inherits its **MIT License**.


[![License: MIT](license-MIT.png)](LICENSE.txt)

**Copyright (c) 2018 Alex Leith**  
**Copyright © 2026 UNIGE/GRID-Geneva**

You are free to use, modify, and distribute this software under the terms of the MIT License.
For more details, see the full license text: [MIT](https://opensource.org/license/mit).
